Experiment 1 Hypothesis Tests

Packages

required_packages <- c(
  "dplyr",
  "tidyr",
  "ggplot2",
  "jsonlite",
  "knitr",
  "lme4",
  "lmerTest",
  "emmeans"
)

missing_packages <- required_packages[!vapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  stop(
    "Missing required packages: ",
    paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", "),
    ". Install them before rendering."
  )
}

lapply(required_packages, library, character.only = TRUE)
## [[1]]
## [1] "dplyr"     "stats"     "graphics"  "grDevices" "utils"     "datasets" 
## [7] "methods"   "base"     
##

## [7] "datasets"  "methods"   "base"     
## 
## [[3]]

##  [7] "utils"     "datasets"  "methods"   "base"     
##

##  [1] "jsonlite"  "ggplot2"   "tidyr"     "dplyr"     "stats"     "graphics"

##  [7] "tidyr"     "dplyr"     "stats"     "graphics"  "grDevices" "utils"    
## [13] "datasets"  "methods"   "base"

##  [1] "emmeans"   "lmerTest"  "lme4"      "Matrix"    "knitr"     "jsonlite"

## [13] "utils"     "datasets"  "methods"   "base"

Paths

report_dir <- local({
  current_input <- tryCatch(
    knitr::current_input(),
    error = function(e) character(0)
  )

  if (length(current_input) == 1 && nzchar(current_input)) {
    input_path <- current_input
    if (!grepl("^(/|[A-Za-z]:[/\\\\])", input_path)) {
      input_path <- file.path(getwd(), input_path)
    }

    if (grepl("\\.[Rr]md$", input_path) || file.exists(input_path)) {
      return(normalizePath(dirname(input_path), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
    }
  }

  fallback_dir <- file.path(getwd(), "Experiment1", "analysis")
  normalizePath(fallback_dir, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
})

resolve_report_path <- function(path_value) {
  if (grepl("^(/|[A-Za-z]:[/\\\\])", path_value)) {
    return(normalizePath(path_value, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
  }

  normalizePath(
    file.path(report_dir, path_value),
    winslash = "/",
    mustWork = TRUE
  )
}

data_dir <- resolve_report_path(params$data_dir)

Helpers

TREATMENT_CONDITIONS <- c(2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 9, 18, 19, 20)

TRUST_ITEM_KEYS <- c(
  "skeptical_rating",
  "data_trust",
  "usability_difficulty",
  "comprehension_ease"
)

INTERACTION_ITEM_KEYS <- c(
  "navigation_control",
  "content_control",
  "pace_control",
  "interface_exploration",
  "interface_responsiveness",
  "user_communication",
  "personal_conversation",
  "interface_interaction",
  "interface_sensitivity"
)

PERSONALITY_ITEM_KEYS <- c(
  "respect_others",
  "good_word_everyone",
  "retreat_from_others",
  "avoid_contacts"
)

extract_condition_number <- function(condition_id) {
  if (is.na(condition_id) || !nzchar(condition_id)) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }

  parts <- strsplit(as.character(condition_id), "_")[[1]]
  hits <- parts[grepl("^[0-9]+$", parts)]

  if (length(hits) == 0) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }

  as.numeric(hits[[1]])
}

load_participant_data <- function(file_path) {
  df <- read.csv(file_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  df$source_file <- basename(file_path)

  if (!"participant_id" %in% names(df) || all(is.na(df$participant_id))) {
    participant_id <- strsplit(
      tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file_path)),
      "_"
    )[[1]][2]
    df$participant_id <- participant_id
  }

  if ("condition_id" %in% names(df)) {
    df$condition_id[is.na(df$condition_id)] <- "unknown"
    df$condition_number <- vapply(
      df$condition_id,
      extract_condition_number,
      numeric(1)
    )
  } else {
    df$condition_id <- "unknown"
    df$condition_number <- NA_real_
  }

  df
}

parse_response_json <- function(value) {
  if (is.na(value) || !nzchar(value)) {
    return(list())
  }

  parsed <- tryCatch(
    jsonlite::fromJSON(value, simplifyVector = TRUE),
    error = function(e) list()
  )

  if (is.null(parsed) || length(parsed) == 0) {
    return(list())
  }

  parsed
}

expand_response_columns <- function(data) {
  parsed <- lapply(data$response, parse_response_json)
  expanded <- bind_rows(
    lapply(parsed, function(x) {
      if (length(x) == 0) {
        return(data.frame())
      }
      as.data.frame(x, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    })
  )

  if (nrow(expanded) == 0) {
    expanded <- data.frame(row.names = seq_len(nrow(data)))
  }

  if (nrow(expanded) < nrow(data)) {
    expanded[(nrow(expanded) + 1):nrow(data), ] <- NA
  }

  overlap <- intersect(names(expanded), names(data))
  if (length(overlap) > 0) {
    data <- data[, setdiff(names(data), overlap), drop = FALSE]
  }

  bind_cols(data, expanded)
}

normalize_likert_0_6_to_1_7 <- function(values) {
  numeric_values <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(values))
  valid <- numeric_values[!is.na(numeric_values)]

  if (length(valid) == 0) {
    return(numeric_values)
  }

  if (all(valid >= 0 & valid <= 6)) {
    return(pmin(pmax(numeric_values + 1, 1), 7))
  }

  numeric_values
}

reverse_likert_1_7 <- function(values) {
  8 - suppressWarnings(as.numeric(values))
}

map_interaction_group <- function(condition_number) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    condition_number %in% c(2, 3, 9) ~ "Static",
    condition_number %in% c(4, 5, 6) ~ "Interactive",
    condition_number %in% c(18, 19, 20) ~ "Buggy",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

map_vis_type <- function(condition_number) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    condition_number %in% c(2, 5, 19) ~ "PI",
    condition_number %in% c(3, 4, 18) ~ "Ensemble",
    condition_number %in% c(6, 9, 20) ~ "PI + Ensemble",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

safe_min <- function(x) {
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  min(x)
}

safe_max <- function(x) {
  x <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) {
    return(NA_real_)
  }
  max(x)
}

set_sum_contrasts <- function(data, factors) {
  out <- data
  for (factor_name in factors) {
    out[[factor_name]] <- factor(out[[factor_name]])
    contrasts(out[[factor_name]]) <- contr.sum(length(levels(out[[factor_name]])))
  }
  out
}

augment_contrast_table <- function(table_df, family_label, alpha, adjust_method) {
  out <- as.data.frame(table_df)
  out$family <- family_label
  out$p_adjusted <- p.adjust(out$p.value, method = adjust_method)
  out$alpha <- alpha
  out
}

Load and Prepare Data

csv_files <- sort(list.files(
  data_dir,
  pattern = params$csv_pattern,
  full.names = TRUE
))

raw_data <- bind_rows(lapply(csv_files, load_participant_data)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(participant_id)) %>%
  filter(tolower(as.character(participant_id)) != "test")

prediction_rows_raw <- raw_data %>%
  filter(trial_type == "prediction-task")

trust_rows_raw <- raw_data %>%
  filter(trial_type == "trust-survey")

personality_rows_raw <- raw_data %>%
  filter(trial_type == "personality-survey")

trust_rows_expanded <- expand_response_columns(trust_rows_raw)
personality_rows_expanded <- expand_response_columns(personality_rows_raw)

for (col in PERSONALITY_ITEM_KEYS) {
  if (!col %in% names(personality_rows_expanded)) {
    personality_rows_expanded[[col]] <- NA_real_
  }
  personality_rows_expanded[[col]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(personality_rows_expanded[[col]])) + 1
}

personality_participant <- personality_rows_expanded %>%
  mutate(
    participant_id = as.character(participant_id),
    general_trust_composite = rowMeans(
      dplyr::select(., dplyr::all_of(PERSONALITY_ITEM_KEYS)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    general_trust_composite = ifelse(
      is.finite(general_trust_composite),
      general_trust_composite,
      NA_real_
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  summarise(
    general_trust_composite = mean(general_trust_composite, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    general_trust_composite = ifelse(
      is.finite(general_trust_composite),
      general_trust_composite,
      NA_real_
    )
  )

for (col in c(TRUST_ITEM_KEYS, INTERACTION_ITEM_KEYS)) {
  if (col %in% names(trust_rows_expanded)) {
    trust_rows_expanded[[col]] <- normalize_likert_0_6_to_1_7(trust_rows_expanded[[col]])
  }
}

trust_treatment <- trust_rows_expanded %>%
  mutate(
    condition_number = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(condition_number)),
    vis_type = map_vis_type(condition_number),
    interaction_group = map_interaction_group(condition_number),
    participant_id = as.character(participant_id)
  ) %>%
  filter(condition_number %in% TREATMENT_CONDITIONS) %>%
  filter(!is.na(vis_type), !is.na(interaction_group))

for (col in c(TRUST_ITEM_KEYS, INTERACTION_ITEM_KEYS)) {
  if (col %in% names(trust_treatment)) {
    trust_treatment[[col]] <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(trust_treatment[[col]]))
  }
}

trust_treatment <- trust_treatment %>%
  mutate(
    skeptical_rating_scored = reverse_likert_1_7(skeptical_rating),
    usability_difficulty_scored = reverse_likert_1_7(usability_difficulty),
    trust_composite = rowMeans(
      cbind(
        skeptical_rating_scored,
        data_trust,
        usability_difficulty_scored,
        comprehension_ease
      ),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    interaction_composite = rowMeans(
      dplyr::select(., dplyr::all_of(INTERACTION_ITEM_KEYS)),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  )

trust_treatment$trust_composite[!is.finite(trust_treatment$trust_composite)] <- NA_real_
trust_treatment$interaction_composite[!is.finite(trust_treatment$interaction_composite)] <- NA_real_

complete_participants <- trust_treatment %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  summarise(
    n_interaction_groups = n_distinct(interaction_group),
    n_treatment_rows = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_interaction_groups == 3, n_treatment_rows >= 3) %>%
  pull(participant_id)

h2_data <- trust_treatment %>%
  filter(participant_id %in% complete_participants) %>%
  filter(is.finite(trust_composite)) %>%
  left_join(personality_participant, by = "participant_id") %>%
  filter(is.finite(general_trust_composite)) %>%
  mutate(
    participant_id = factor(participant_id),
    vis_type = factor(vis_type, levels = c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble")),
    interaction_group = factor(interaction_group, levels = c("Static", "Interactive", "Buggy"))
  ) %>%
  droplevels()

h3_data <- trust_treatment %>%
  filter(participant_id %in% complete_participants) %>%
  filter(is.finite(interaction_composite)) %>%
  mutate(
    participant_id = factor(participant_id),
    vis_type = factor(vis_type, levels = c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble")),
    interaction_group = factor(interaction_group, levels = c("Static", "Interactive", "Buggy"))
  ) %>%
  droplevels()

prediction_rows_prepared <- prediction_rows_raw %>%
  mutate(
    phase = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(phase)),
    condition_number = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(condition_number)),
    vis_type = map_vis_type(condition_number),
    interaction_group = map_interaction_group(condition_number),
    confidence_rating = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(confidence_rating)),
    participant_id = as.character(participant_id)
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(confidence_rating))

h1_baseline <- prediction_rows_prepared %>%
  filter(phase == 1) %>%
  group_by(participant_id) %>%
  summarise(
    baseline_confidence = mean(confidence_rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(baseline_confidence))

h1_phase2_condition <- prediction_rows_prepared %>%
  filter(phase %in% c(2, 3, 4)) %>%
  filter(condition_number %in% TREATMENT_CONDITIONS) %>%
  filter(!is.na(vis_type), !is.na(interaction_group), is.finite(condition_number)) %>%
  group_by(participant_id, condition_number, condition_name, vis_type, interaction_group) %>%
  summarise(
    confidence_rating = mean(confidence_rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(confidence_rating))

h1_data <- h1_phase2_condition %>%
  inner_join(h1_baseline, by = "participant_id") %>%
  mutate(
    confidence_shift = confidence_rating - baseline_confidence,
    participant_id = factor(participant_id),
    vis_type = factor(vis_type, levels = c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble")),
    interaction_group = factor(interaction_group, levels = c("Static", "Interactive", "Buggy"))
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(confidence_shift)) %>%
  droplevels()

h1_summary <- h1_data %>%
  group_by(vis_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n_distinct(participant_id),
    mean_shift = mean(confidence_shift, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_shift = sd(confidence_shift, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_shift = sd_shift / sqrt(pmax(n, 1)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    group_category = factor(vis_type, levels = c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble"), ordered = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  arrange(group_category)

h1_data <- h1_data %>%
  mutate(
    vis_type = factor(vis_type, levels = c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble"))
  ) %>%
  droplevels()

Sample Flow and Cell Counts

sample_flow <- data.frame(
  stage = c(
    "Participant CSV files",
    "Participants after dropping test IDs",
    "Prediction rows (all)",
    "Trust-survey rows (all)",
    "Participants with complete treatment rows (Static + Interactive + Buggy)",
    "H1 rows used",
    "H2 rows used",
    "H3 rows used"
  ),
  value = c(
    length(csv_files),
    dplyr::n_distinct(raw_data$participant_id),
    nrow(prediction_rows_raw),
    nrow(trust_rows_raw),
    length(complete_participants),
    nrow(h1_data),
    nrow(h2_data),
    nrow(h3_data)
  )
)

knitr::kable(sample_flow, align = c("l", "r"))
stage value
Participant CSV files 337
Participants after dropping test IDs 337
Prediction rows (all) 1340
Trust-survey rows (all) 1340
Participants with complete treatment rows (Static + Interactive + Buggy) 335
H1 rows used 1005
H2 rows used 1005
H3 rows used 1005 
h1_cell_counts <- h1_data %>%
  count(vis_type, name = "n")

h2_cell_counts <- h2_data %>%
  count(interaction_group, vis_type, name = "n")

knitr::kable(h1_cell_counts, caption = "H1 Cell Counts: Confidence Shift Rows by Visualization Family")
H1 Cell Counts: Confidence Shift Rows by Visualization Family
vis_type n
PI 340
Ensemble 330
PI + Ensemble 335 
knitr::kable(h2_cell_counts, caption = "H2/H3 Cell Counts: Trust-Survey Rows by Interaction Group and Visualization Family")
H2/H3 Cell Counts: Trust-Survey Rows by Interaction Group and Visualization Family
interaction_group vis_type n
Static PI 114
Static Ensemble 109
Static PI + Ensemble 112
Interactive PI 117
Interactive Ensemble 109
Interactive PI + Ensemble 109
Buggy PI 109
Buggy Ensemble 112
Buggy PI + Ensemble 114

Preprocessing Validation

range_check <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(
    scale = "Trust composite items (normalized)",
    item = TRUST_ITEM_KEYS,
    min_value = vapply(TRUST_ITEM_KEYS, function(k) safe_min(trust_treatment[[k]]), numeric(1)),
    max_value = vapply(TRUST_ITEM_KEYS, function(k) safe_max(trust_treatment[[k]]), numeric(1))
  ),
  data.frame(
    scale = "Interaction composite items (normalized)",
    item = INTERACTION_ITEM_KEYS,
    min_value = vapply(INTERACTION_ITEM_KEYS, function(k) safe_min(trust_treatment[[k]]), numeric(1)),
    max_value = vapply(INTERACTION_ITEM_KEYS, function(k) safe_max(trust_treatment[[k]]), numeric(1))
  )
)

condition_mapping_check <- trust_treatment %>%
  distinct(condition_number, condition_name, interaction_group, vis_type) %>%
  arrange(condition_number)

knitr::kable(range_check, digits = 2, caption = "Likert Range Checks After 0-6 -> 1-7 Normalization")
Likert Range Checks After 0-6 -> 1-7 Normalization
scale item min_value max_value
skeptical_rating Trust composite items (normalized) skeptical_rating 1 7
data_trust Trust composite items (normalized) data_trust 1 7
usability_difficulty Trust composite items (normalized) usability_difficulty 1 7
comprehension_ease Trust composite items (normalized) comprehension_ease 1 7
navigation_control Interaction composite items (normalized) navigation_control 1 7
content_control Interaction composite items (normalized) content_control 1 7
pace_control Interaction composite items (normalized) pace_control 1 7
interface_exploration Interaction composite items (normalized) interface_exploration 1 7
interface_responsiveness Interaction composite items (normalized) interface_responsiveness 1 7
user_communication Interaction composite items (normalized) user_communication 1 7
personal_conversation Interaction composite items (normalized) personal_conversation 1 7
interface_interaction Interaction composite items (normalized) interface_interaction 1 7
interface_sensitivity Interaction composite items (normalized) interface_sensitivity 1 7 
knitr::kable(condition_mapping_check, caption = "Condition Mapping Check")
Condition Mapping Check
condition_number condition_name interaction_group vis_type
2 PI Plot Static PI
3 Ensemble Plot Static Ensemble
4 Ensemble + Hover Interactive Ensemble
5 PI Plot + Hover Interactive PI
6 PI to Ensemble Interactive PI + Ensemble
9 Combined PI + Ensemble Static PI + Ensemble
18 Glitch Ensemble + Hover Buggy Ensemble
19 Glitch PI Plot + Hover Buggy PI
20 Glitch PI to Ensemble Buggy PI + Ensemble

H1: Confidence Shift from Baseline by Visualization Family

h1_participant_means <- h1_data %>%
  group_by(participant_id, vis_type, interaction_group) %>%
  summarise(
    baseline_confidence = mean(baseline_confidence, na.rm = TRUE),
    treatment_confidence = mean(confidence_rating, na.rm = TRUE),
    confidence_shift = mean(confidence_shift, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    is.finite(baseline_confidence),
    is.finite(treatment_confidence),
    is.finite(confidence_shift)
  )

h1_anova_data <- bind_rows(
  h1_participant_means %>%
    distinct(participant_id, baseline_confidence) %>%
    transmute(
      participant_id,
      vis_type = "Baseline",
      interaction_availability = "Static",
      confidence = baseline_confidence
    ),
  h1_participant_means %>%
    transmute(
      participant_id,
      vis_type = as.character(vis_type),
      interaction_availability = as.character(interaction_group),
      confidence = treatment_confidence
    )
) %>%
  mutate(
    participant_id = factor(participant_id),
    vis_type = factor(vis_type, levels = c("Baseline", "PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble")),
    interaction_availability = factor(
      interaction_availability,
      levels = c("Static", "Interactive", "Buggy")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(confidence))

h1_model_data <- set_sum_contrasts(
  h1_anova_data,
  factors = c("vis_type", "interaction_availability")
)

h1_anova_model <- lm(
  confidence ~ vis_type * interaction_availability + participant_id,
  data = h1_model_data
)

h1_anova <- anova(h1_anova_model)

h1_vis_emmeans_data <- bind_rows(
  h1_participant_means %>%
    distinct(participant_id, baseline_confidence) %>%
    transmute(
      participant_id,
      vis_type = "Baseline",
      confidence = baseline_confidence
    ),
  h1_participant_means %>%
    transmute(
      participant_id,
      vis_type = as.character(vis_type),
      confidence = treatment_confidence
    )
) %>%
  mutate(
    participant_id = factor(participant_id),
    vis_type = factor(vis_type, levels = c("Baseline", "PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble"))
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(confidence))

h1_vis_emmeans_model <- lm(
  confidence ~ vis_type + participant_id,
  data = h1_vis_emmeans_data
)

h1_vis_emm <- emmeans(h1_vis_emmeans_model, ~ vis_type)
h1_vis_emmeans <- as.data.frame(
  summary(h1_vis_emm, infer = FALSE)
)
h1_vis_pairs <- as.data.frame(
  summary(pairs(h1_vis_emm, adjust = "tukey"))
)

h1_interaction_emmeans_data <- bind_rows(
  h1_participant_means %>%
    distinct(participant_id, baseline_confidence) %>%
    transmute(
      participant_id,
      interaction_availability = "Baseline",
      confidence = baseline_confidence
    ),
  h1_participant_means %>%
    transmute(
      participant_id,
      interaction_availability = as.character(interaction_group),
      confidence = treatment_confidence
    )
) %>%
  mutate(
    participant_id = factor(participant_id),
    interaction_availability = factor(
      interaction_availability,
      levels = c("Baseline", "Static", "Interactive", "Buggy")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(confidence))

h1_interaction_emmeans_model <- lm(
  confidence ~ interaction_availability + participant_id,
  data = h1_interaction_emmeans_data
)

h1_interaction_emm <- emmeans(h1_interaction_emmeans_model, ~ interaction_availability)
h1_interaction_emmeans <- as.data.frame(
  summary(h1_interaction_emm, infer = FALSE)
)
h1_interaction_pairs <- as.data.frame(
  summary(pairs(h1_interaction_emm, adjust = "tukey"))
)

h1_singular <- NA

knitr::kable(h1_summary, digits = 4, caption = "H1 Summary: Confidence Shift from Baseline by Visualization Family")
H1 Summary: Confidence Shift from Baseline by Visualization Family
vis_type n mean_shift sd_shift se_shift group_category
PI 226 -0.2147 1.0799 0.0718 PI
Ensemble 221 -0.3061 1.3948 0.0938 Ensemble
PI + Ensemble 335 -0.4418 1.3499 0.0738 PI + Ensemble 
h1_anova
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: confidence
##                                    Df  Sum Sq Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
## vis_type                            3   40.64 13.5458 16.0564 3.368e-10 ***
## interaction_availability            2    7.12  3.5624  4.2227   0.01492 *  
## participant_id                    334 1805.21  5.4048  6.4066 < 2.2e-16 ***
## vis_type:interaction_availability   4    4.59  1.1483  1.3611   0.24550    
## Residuals                         996  840.26  0.8436                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
knitr::kable(
  h1_vis_emmeans %>%
    transmute(
      vis_type,
      mean = emmean,
      se = SE
    ),
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H1 Estimated Marginal Means by Visualization Family (including Baseline)"
)
H1 Estimated Marginal Means by Visualization Family (including Baseline)
vis_type mean se
Baseline 4.4000 0.0504
PI 4.1837 0.0558
Ensemble 4.0956 0.0568
PI + Ensemble 3.9582 0.0504 
knitr::kable(
  h1_interaction_emmeans %>%
    transmute(
      interaction_availability,
      mean = emmean,
      se = SE
    ),
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H1 Estimated Marginal Means by Interaction Availability (including Baseline)"
)
H1 Estimated Marginal Means by Interaction Availability (including Baseline)
interaction_availability mean se
Baseline 4.4000 0.0504
Static 3.9612 0.0504
Interactive 4.1343 0.0504
Buggy 4.1433 0.0504 
knitr::kable(
  h1_vis_pairs,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H1 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Visualization Family"
)
H1 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Visualization Family
contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value
Baseline - PI 0.2163 0.0752 1002 2.8767 0.0213
Baseline - Ensemble 0.3044 0.0759 1002 4.0088 0.0004
Baseline - (PI + Ensemble) 0.4418 0.0712 1002 6.2009 0.0000
PI - Ensemble 0.0881 0.0872 1002 1.0103 0.7434
PI - (PI + Ensemble) 0.2255 0.0752 1002 2.9992 0.0147
Ensemble - (PI + Ensemble) 0.1374 0.0759 1002 1.8089 0.2697 
knitr::kable(
  h1_interaction_pairs,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H1 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Interaction Availability"
)
H1 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Interaction Availability
contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value
Baseline - Static 0.4388 0.0713 1002 6.1546 0.0000
Baseline - Interactive 0.2657 0.0713 1002 3.7263 0.0012
Baseline - Buggy 0.2567 0.0713 1002 3.6007 0.0019
Static - Interactive -0.1731 0.0713 1002 -2.4284 0.0725
Static - Buggy -0.1821 0.0713 1002 -2.5540 0.0526
Interactive - Buggy -0.0090 0.0713 1002 -0.1256 0.9993 
h1_plot_data <- h1_summary %>%
  mutate(vis_type = factor(vis_type, levels = c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble"), ordered = TRUE))

ggplot(h1_plot_data, aes(y = vis_type, x = mean_shift)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#9CA3AF", width = 0.72) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    aes(xmin = mean_shift - se_shift, xmax = mean_shift + se_shift),
    height = 0.18,
    color = "#4B5563",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "#6c757d", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "H1: Confidence Shift from Baseline by Visualization Family (mean +/- SE)",
    x = "Confidence shift from baseline",
    y = "Visualization family"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank())

H2: Trust Composite and Interaction Availability by Visualization Family

h2_model_data <- set_sum_contrasts(h2_data, factors = c("interaction_group", "vis_type"))

h2_model <- lm(
  trust_composite ~ interaction_group * vis_type + general_trust_composite + participant_id,
  data = h2_model_data,
  na.action = na.exclude
)

h2_anova <- anova(h2_model)
h2_singular <- NA

h2_condition_emm <- emmeans(h2_model, ~ interaction_group * vis_type)
h2_condition_means <- as.data.frame(
  summary(h2_condition_emm, infer = FALSE)
) %>%
  mutate(
    condition = paste(interaction_group, vis_type)
  )
h2_condition_pairs <- as.data.frame(
  summary(pairs(h2_condition_emm, adjust = "tukey"))
)

h2_interaction_emm <- emmeans(h2_model, ~ interaction_group)
h2_interaction_means <- as.data.frame(
  summary(h2_interaction_emm, infer = FALSE)
)
h2_interaction_pairs <- as.data.frame(
  summary(pairs(h2_interaction_emm, adjust = "tukey"))
)

h2_vis_emm <- emmeans(h2_model, ~ vis_type)
h2_vis_means <- as.data.frame(
  summary(h2_vis_emm, infer = FALSE)
)
h2_vis_pairs <- as.data.frame(
  summary(pairs(h2_vis_emm, adjust = "tukey"))
)

h2_anova
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: trust_composite
##                             Df  Sum Sq Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
## interaction_group            2   30.07 15.0346 21.0822  1.33e-09 ***
## vis_type                     2   55.11 27.5530 38.6361 < 2.2e-16 ***
## general_trust_composite      1   10.04 10.0418 14.0811 0.0001905 ***
## participant_id             333 1109.98  3.3333  4.6741 < 2.2e-16 ***
## interaction_group:vis_type   4   13.95  3.4881  4.8912 0.0006830 ***
## Residuals                  662  472.10  0.7131                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
knitr::kable(
  h2_condition_means %>%
    transmute(
      condition,
      interaction_group,
      vis_type,
      mean = emmean,
      se = SE
    ),
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H2 Estimated Means by Individual Condition (Interaction x Visualization)"
)
H2 Estimated Means by Individual Condition (Interaction x Visualization)
condition interaction_group vis_type mean se
Static PI Static PI 4.9118 0.0950
Interactive PI Interactive PI 4.9671 0.0937
Buggy PI Buggy PI 4.5950 0.0973
Static Ensemble Static Ensemble 4.0459 0.0973
Interactive Ensemble Interactive Ensemble 4.6800 0.0973
Buggy Ensemble Buggy Ensemble 4.3967 0.0959
Static PI + Ensemble Static PI + Ensemble 4.0496 0.0959
Interactive PI + Ensemble Interactive PI + Ensemble 4.5571 0.0973
Buggy PI + Ensemble Buggy PI + Ensemble 4.2650 0.0950 
knitr::kable(
  h2_interaction_means %>%
    transmute(
      interaction_group,
      mean = emmean,
      se = SE
    ),
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H2 Estimated Means by Interaction Group"
)
H2 Estimated Means by Interaction Group
interaction_group mean se
Static 4.3358 0.0462
Interactive 4.7347 0.0462
Buggy 4.4189 0.0462 
knitr::kable(
  h2_vis_means %>%
    transmute(
      vis_type,
      mean = emmean,
      se = SE
    ),
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H2 Estimated Means by Visualization Family"
)
H2 Estimated Means by Visualization Family
vis_type mean se
PI 4.8246 0.0549
Ensemble 4.3742 0.0560
PI + Ensemble 4.2906 0.0462 
knitr::kable(
  h2_condition_pairs,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H2 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Individual Condition (Interaction x Visualization)"
)
H2 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Individual Condition (Interaction x Visualization)

(Static PI + Ensemble) - (Interactive PI + Ensemble) -0.5075 0.1465 662 -3.4635 0.0165

(Interactive PI + Ensemble) - (Buggy PI + Ensemble) 0.2921 0.1461 662 1.9998 0.5440 
knitr::kable(
  h2_interaction_pairs,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H2 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Interaction Group"
)
H2 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Interaction Group
contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value
Static - Interactive -0.3990 0.0653 662 -6.1117 0.0000
Static - Buggy -0.0832 0.0653 662 -1.2740 0.4104
Interactive - Buggy 0.3158 0.0653 662 4.8379 0.0000 
knitr::kable(
  h2_vis_pairs,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H2 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Visualization Family"
)
H2 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Visualization Family
contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value
PI - Ensemble 0.4504 0.0897 662 5.0227 0.0000
PI - (PI + Ensemble) 0.5340 0.0717 662 7.4453 0.0000
Ensemble - (PI + Ensemble) 0.0836 0.0726 662 1.1518 0.4826 
h2_plot_data <- h2_condition_means %>%
  mutate(
    ymin = pmax(1, emmean - SE),
    ymax = pmin(7, emmean + SE)
  )

ggplot(h2_plot_data, aes(x = interaction_group, y = emmean, group = 1)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8, color = "#1B5E20") +
  geom_line(color = "#1B5E20") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), width = 0.15, color = "#1B5E20") +
  facet_wrap(~ vis_type, nrow = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(1, 7), breaks = 1:7) +
  labs(
    title = "H2: Trust Composite by Interaction Group Within Visualization Family",
    x = "Interaction group",
    y = "Estimated mean trust composite (+/- SE)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

H3: Interaction Experience Composite Across Interaction Availability

h3_model_data <- set_sum_contrasts(h3_data, factors = c("interaction_group", "vis_type"))

h3_model <- lm(
  interaction_composite ~ interaction_group * vis_type + participant_id,
  data = h3_model_data,
  na.action = na.exclude
)

h3_anova <- anova(h3_model)
h3_singular <- NA

h3_condition_emm <- emmeans(h3_model, ~ interaction_group * vis_type)
h3_condition_means <- as.data.frame(
  summary(h3_condition_emm, infer = FALSE)
) %>%
  mutate(
    condition = paste(interaction_group, vis_type)
  )
h3_condition_pairs <- as.data.frame(
  summary(pairs(h3_condition_emm, adjust = "tukey"))
)

h3_interaction_emm <- emmeans(h3_model, ~ interaction_group)
h3_interaction_means <- as.data.frame(
  summary(h3_interaction_emm, infer = FALSE)
)
h3_interaction_pairs <- as.data.frame(
  summary(pairs(h3_interaction_emm, adjust = "tukey"))
)

h3_vis_emm <- emmeans(h3_model, ~ vis_type)
h3_vis_means <- as.data.frame(
  summary(h3_vis_emm, infer = FALSE)
)
h3_vis_pairs <- as.data.frame(
  summary(pairs(h3_vis_emm, adjust = "tukey"))
)

h3_anova
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: interaction_composite
##                             Df  Sum Sq Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
## interaction_group            2   30.51 15.2531  45.983 < 2.2e-16 ***
## vis_type                     2    4.50  2.2483   6.778  0.001219 ** 
## participant_id             334 1227.18  3.6742  11.077 < 2.2e-16 ***
## interaction_group:vis_type   4    2.71  0.6773   2.042  0.086924 .  
## Residuals                  662  219.59  0.3317                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
knitr::kable(
  h3_condition_means %>%
    transmute(
      condition,
      interaction_group,
      vis_type,
      mean = emmean,
      se = SE
    ),
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H3 Estimated Means by Individual Condition (Interaction x Visualization)"
)
H3 Estimated Means by Individual Condition (Interaction x Visualization)
condition interaction_group vis_type mean se
Static PI Static PI 3.6256 0.0648
Interactive PI Interactive PI 3.8459 0.0639
Buggy PI Buggy PI 3.8254 0.0664
Static Ensemble Static Ensemble 3.3838 0.0664
Interactive Ensemble Interactive Ensemble 3.9451 0.0664
Buggy Ensemble Buggy Ensemble 3.7114 0.0654
Static PI + Ensemble Static PI + Ensemble 3.3082 0.0654
Interactive PI + Ensemble Interactive PI + Ensemble 3.7779 0.0664
Buggy PI + Ensemble Buggy PI + Ensemble 3.6679 0.0648 
knitr::kable(
  h3_interaction_means %>%
    transmute(
      interaction_group,
      mean = emmean,
      se = SE
    ),
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H3 Estimated Means by Interaction Group"
)
H3 Estimated Means by Interaction Group
interaction_group mean se
Static 3.4392 0.0315
Interactive 3.8563 0.0315
Buggy 3.7349 0.0315 
knitr::kable(
  h3_vis_means %>%
    transmute(
      vis_type,
      mean = emmean,
      se = SE
    ),
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H3 Estimated Means by Visualization Family"
)

vis_type mean se
PI 3.7656 0.0374
Ensemble 3.6801 0.0382
PI + Ensemble 3.5847 0.0315

  h3_condition_pairs,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "H3 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Individual Condition (Interaction x Visualization)"
)

)

  digits = 4,
  caption = "H3 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Visualization Family"
)
H3 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons by Visualization Family
contrast estimate SE df t.ratio p.value
PI - Ensemble 0.0855 0.0612 662 1.3984 0.3423
PI - (PI + Ensemble) 0.1810 0.0489 662 3.6995 0.0007
Ensemble - (PI + Ensemble) 0.0954 0.0495 662 1.9281 0.1316 
h3_plot_data <- h3_interaction_means %>%
  mutate(
    ymin = pmax(1, emmean - SE),
    ymax = pmin(7, emmean + SE)
  )

ggplot(h3_plot_data, aes(x = interaction_group, y = emmean)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, color = "#4A148C") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax), width = 0.15, color = "#4A148C") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(1, 7), breaks = 1:7) +
  labs(
    title = "H3: Interaction Experience Composite by Interaction Group",
    x = "Interaction group",
    y = "Estimated mean interaction composite (+/- SE)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

Model Execution Checks

model_checks <- data.frame(
  hypothesis = c("H1", "H2", "H3"),
  rows_used = c(nrow(h1_data), nrow(h2_data), nrow(h3_data)),
  participants = c(
    dplyr::n_distinct(h1_data$participant_id),
    dplyr::n_distinct(h2_data$participant_id),
    dplyr::n_distinct(h3_data$participant_id)
  ),
  vis_levels_present = c(
    all(c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble") %in% levels(h1_data$vis_type)),
    all(c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble") %in% levels(h2_data$vis_type)),
    all(c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble") %in% levels(h3_data$vis_type))
  ),
  interaction_levels_present = c(
    all(c("Static", "Interactive", "Buggy") %in% levels(h1_data$interaction_group)),
    all(c("Static", "Interactive", "Buggy") %in% levels(h2_data$interaction_group)),
    all(c("Static", "Interactive", "Buggy") %in% levels(h3_data$interaction_group))
  ),
  singular_lmm = c(h1_singular, h2_singular, h3_singular)
)

knitr::kable(model_checks, caption = "Model Execution Validation")
Model Execution Validation
hypothesis rows_used participants vis_levels_present interaction_levels_present singular_lmm
H1 1005 335 TRUE TRUE NA
H2 1005 335 TRUE TRUE NA
H3 1005 335 TRUE TRUE NA

Additional ANOVA: Visualization Family Within Interactive Availability Only

interactive_vis_data <- h2_data %>%
  filter(interaction_group == "Interactive") %>%
  mutate(
    vis_type = factor(vis_type, levels = c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble"))
  ) %>%
  droplevels()

if (nrow(interactive_vis_data) == 0) {
  stop("No rows found for interaction_group == 'Interactive'.")
}

interactive_vis_model <- lm(trust_composite ~ vis_type, data = interactive_vis_data)
interactive_vis_anova <- anova(interactive_vis_model)

interactive_vis_summary <- interactive_vis_data %>%
  group_by(vis_type) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean = mean(trust_composite, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(trust_composite, na.rm = TRUE),
    se = sd / sqrt(pmax(n, 1)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

interactive_vis_anova
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: trust_composite
##            Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F)   
## vis_type    2  14.30  7.1512  5.1143 0.006492 **
## Residuals 332 464.23  1.3983                    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
knitr::kable(
  interactive_vis_summary,
  digits = 4,
  caption = "Interactive-only Trust Composite by Visualization Family"
)
Interactive-only Trust Composite by Visualization Family
vis_type n mean sd se
PI 117 4.9872 1.0916 0.1009
Ensemble 109 4.7317 1.1137 0.1067
PI + Ensemble 109 4.4839 1.3335 0.1277

Additional Analysis: Q1-Q3 Models by Visualization Type and Interaction Availability (with Baseline)

prediction_q123_raw <- prediction_rows_prepared %>%
  filter(phase %in% c(1, 2, 3, 4)) %>%
  mutate(
    is_baseline_phase = phase == 1,
    q123_vis_type = case_when(
      is_baseline_phase ~ "PI",
      condition_number %in% TREATMENT_CONDITIONS ~ vis_type,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    q123_interaction_availability = case_when(
      is_baseline_phase ~ "Static",
      condition_number %in% TREATMENT_CONDITIONS ~ interaction_group,
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    q123_condition_number = case_when(
      is_baseline_phase ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ condition_number
    ),
    q123_condition_name = case_when(
      is_baseline_phase ~ "Baseline",
      TRUE ~ as.character(condition_name)
    ),
    probability = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(probability_estimate)),
    city_a_estimate = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(city_a_estimate)),
    city_b_estimate = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(city_b_estimate)),
    estimated_value_row = rowMeans(cbind(city_a_estimate, city_b_estimate), na.rm = TRUE),
    estimated_value_row = ifelse(is.finite(estimated_value_row), estimated_value_row, NA_real_),
    decision_result_row = case_when(
      !is.na(travel_choice) & !is.na(city_a_label) & travel_choice == city_a_label ~ "A",
      !is.na(travel_choice) & !is.na(city_b_label) & travel_choice == city_b_label ~ "B",
      tolower(trimws(as.character(travel_choice))) == "no preference" ~ "No Preference",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(q123_vis_type), !is.na(q123_interaction_availability))

mode_or_na <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & nzchar(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  names(sort(table(x), decreasing = TRUE))[1]
}

prediction_q123_condition <- prediction_q123_raw %>%
  group_by(participant_id, q123_condition_number, q123_condition_name, q123_vis_type, q123_interaction_availability) %>%
  summarise(
    probability = mean(probability, na.rm = TRUE),
    estimated_value = mean(estimated_value_row, na.rm = TRUE),
    decision_result = mode_or_na(decision_result_row),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    probability = ifelse(is.finite(probability), probability, NA_real_),
    estimated_value = ifelse(is.finite(estimated_value), estimated_value, NA_real_),
    participant_id = factor(participant_id),
    is_baseline = factor(ifelse(q123_condition_number == 1, "Yes", "No"), levels = c("No", "Yes")),
    condition_number = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(q123_condition_number)),
    condition_name = q123_condition_name,
    vistype = factor(q123_vis_type, levels = c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble")),
    interaction_availability = factor(q123_interaction_availability, levels = c("Static", "Interactive", "Buggy")),
    decision_result = factor(decision_result, levels = c("A", "B", "No Preference"))
  ) %>%
  droplevels()

q123_q1_data <- prediction_q123_condition %>%
  filter(is.finite(probability))

q123_q2_data <- prediction_q123_condition %>%
  filter(is.finite(estimated_value))

q123_q3_data <- prediction_q123_condition %>%
  filter(!is.na(decision_result)) %>%
  droplevels()

Q1: Probability (Continuous)

q123_q1_model_data <- set_sum_contrasts(
  q123_q1_data,
  factors = c("vistype", "interaction_availability", "is_baseline")
)

# Repeated-measures best-practice model
q123_q1_lmer <- lmer(
  probability ~ vistype * interaction_availability * is_baseline + (1 | participant_id),
  data = q123_q1_model_data,
  REML = FALSE,
  na.action = na.exclude
)

anova(q123_q1_lmer, type = 3)
## Type III Analysis of Variance Table with Satterthwaite's method
##                                               Sum Sq Mean Sq NumDF  DenDF
## vistype                                        30.58   15.29     2 1185.3
## interaction_availability                     1543.11  771.55     2 1004.5
## is_baseline                                     2.36    2.36     1 1178.3
## vistype:interaction_availability             1475.78  368.94     4 1290.0
## vistype:is_baseline                                                      
## interaction_availability:is_baseline                                     
## vistype:interaction_availability:is_baseline                             
##                                              F value Pr(>F)
## vistype                                       0.0398 0.9609
## interaction_availability                      2.0110 0.1344
## is_baseline                                   0.0062 0.9375
## vistype:interaction_availability              0.9616 0.4276
## vistype:is_baseline                                        
## interaction_availability:is_baseline                       
## vistype:interaction_availability:is_baseline
q123_q1_baseline_emm_grid <- emmeans(
  q123_q1_lmer,
  ~ 1,
  at = list(
    is_baseline = "Yes",
    interaction_availability = "Static",
    vistype = "PI"
  )
)
q123_q1_baseline_emm_grid@grid$condition_label <- "Baseline"

q123_q1_nonbaseline_emm_grid <- emmeans(
  q123_q1_lmer,
  ~ 1,
  at = list(is_baseline = "No"),
  weights = "proportional"
)
q123_q1_nonbaseline_emm_grid@grid$condition_label <- "Non-baseline"

q123_q1_condition_emm <- rbind(
  q123_q1_baseline_emm_grid,
  q123_q1_nonbaseline_emm_grid,
  adjust = "none"
)
q123_q1_condition_emm <- update(q123_q1_condition_emm, pri.vars = "condition_label")

q123_q1_condition_emmeans <- as.data.frame(
  summary(q123_q1_condition_emm, infer = c(TRUE, FALSE))
) %>%
  mutate(
    condition_label = factor(condition_label, levels = c("Baseline", "Non-baseline")),
    is_baseline = ifelse(condition_label == "Baseline", "Yes", "No")
  ) %>%
  arrange(condition_label) %>%
  select(condition_label, is_baseline, emmean, SE, df, lower.CL, upper.CL)

q123_q1_condition_pairs <- as.data.frame(
  summary(pairs(q123_q1_condition_emm, adjust = "tukey"))
)

knitr::kable(
  q123_q1_condition_emmeans,
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Q1 EMMs for Baseline vs Non-baseline (Non-baseline averaged across conditions)"
)
Q1 EMMs for Baseline vs Non-baseline (Non-baseline averaged across conditions)
condition_label is_baseline emmean SE df lower.CL upper.CL
Baseline Yes 49.561 1.188 1225.889 47.230 51.892
Non-baseline No 48.094 0.801 460.305 46.519 49.668 
knitr::kable(
  q123_q1_condition_pairs,
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Q1 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons for Baseline and Non-baseline EMMs"
)
Q1 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons for Baseline and Non-baseline EMMs
contrast 1 estimate SE df t.ratio p.value
Baseline - (Non-baseline) overall 1.468 1.241 1012.359 1.183 0.237

Q2: Estimated Prediction Value (Continuous)

q123_q2_model_data <- set_sum_contrasts(
  q123_q2_data,
  factors = c("vistype", "interaction_availability", "is_baseline")
)

# Repeated-measures best-practice model
q123_q2_lmer <- lmer(
  estimated_value ~ vistype * interaction_availability * is_baseline + (1 | participant_id),
  data = q123_q2_model_data,
  REML = FALSE,
  na.action = na.exclude
)

anova(q123_q2_lmer, type = 3)
## Type III Analysis of Variance Table with Satterthwaite's method
##                                               Sum Sq Mean Sq NumDF  DenDF
## vistype                                        595.7   297.9     2 1243.5
## interaction_availability                       247.6   123.8     2 1001.8
## is_baseline                                  15086.8 15086.8     1 1230.3
## vistype:interaction_availability               325.3    81.3     4 1262.9
## vistype:is_baseline                                                      
## interaction_availability:is_baseline                                     
## vistype:interaction_availability:is_baseline                             
##                                              F value  Pr(>F)  
## vistype                                       0.0684 0.93386  
## interaction_availability                      0.0284 0.97195  
## is_baseline                                   3.4663 0.06287 .
## vistype:interaction_availability              0.0187 0.99932  
## vistype:is_baseline                                           
## interaction_availability:is_baseline                          
## vistype:interaction_availability:is_baseline                  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
q123_q2_baseline_emm_grid <- emmeans(
  q123_q2_lmer,
  ~ 1,
  at = list(
    is_baseline = "Yes",
    interaction_availability = "Static",
    vistype = "PI"
  )
)
q123_q2_baseline_emm_grid@grid$condition_label <- "Baseline"

q123_q2_nonbaseline_emm_grid <- emmeans(
  q123_q2_lmer,
  ~ 1,
  at = list(is_baseline = "No"),
  weights = "proportional"
)
q123_q2_nonbaseline_emm_grid@grid$condition_label <- "Non-baseline"

q123_q2_condition_emm <- rbind(
  q123_q2_baseline_emm_grid,
  q123_q2_nonbaseline_emm_grid,
  adjust = "none"
)
q123_q2_condition_emm <- update(q123_q2_condition_emm, pri.vars = "condition_label")

q123_q2_condition_emmeans <- as.data.frame(
  summary(q123_q2_condition_emm, infer = c(TRUE, FALSE))
) %>%
  mutate(
    condition_label = factor(condition_label, levels = c("Baseline", "Non-baseline")),
    is_baseline = ifelse(condition_label == "Baseline", "Yes", "No")
  ) %>%
  arrange(condition_label) %>%
  select(condition_label, is_baseline, emmean, SE, df, lower.CL, upper.CL)

q123_q2_condition_pairs <- as.data.frame(
  summary(pairs(q123_q2_condition_emm, adjust = "tukey"))
)

knitr::kable(
  q123_q2_condition_emmeans,
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Q2 EMMs for Baseline vs Non-baseline (Non-baseline averaged across conditions)"
)
Q2 EMMs for Baseline vs Non-baseline (Non-baseline averaged across conditions)
condition_label is_baseline emmean SE df lower.CL upper.CL
Baseline Yes 63.247 3.633 1349.806 56.120 70.373
Non-baseline No 50.084 2.114 569.472 45.931 54.236 
knitr::kable(
  q123_q2_condition_pairs,
  digits = 3,
  caption = "Q2 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons for Baseline and Non-baseline EMMs"
)
Q2 Tukey-adjusted Pairwise Comparisons for Baseline and Non-baseline EMMs
contrast 1 estimate SE df t.ratio p.value
Baseline - (Non-baseline) overall 13.163 4.178 1011.641 3.151 0.002

Q3: Decision Result (A, B, No Preference; Nominal)

q123_q3_model_data <- q123_q3_data %>%
  mutate(
    decision_result = factor(decision_result, levels = c("A", "B", "No Preference")),
    interaction_availability = factor(
      interaction_availability,
      levels = c("Static", "Interactive", "Buggy")
    ),
    vistype = factor(vistype, levels = c("PI", "Ensemble", "PI + Ensemble"))
  ) %>%
  droplevels()

condition_levels <- c(
  "Baseline",
  paste0(
    "Condition ",
    sort(unique(q123_q3_model_data$condition_number[q123_q3_model_data$is_baseline == "No"]))
  )
)

q123_q3_model_data <- q123_q3_model_data %>%
  mutate(
    condition_label = ifelse(is_baseline == "Yes", "Baseline", paste0("Condition ", condition_number)),
    condition_label = factor(condition_label, levels = condition_levels)
  )

q3_condition_portion <- q123_q3_model_data %>%
  count(condition_label, decision_result, .drop = FALSE, name = "n") %>%
  group_by(condition_label) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(n),
    portion = ifelse(total > 0, n / total, 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(q3_condition_portion, aes(x = condition_label, y = portion, fill = decision_result)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    labels = function(x) paste0(round(x * 100), "%")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Q3 Decision Portion by Condition",
    x = "Condition",
    y = "Decision Portion",
    fill = "Decision"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

q3_condition_portion_table <- q3_condition_portion %>%
  group_by(condition_label) %>%
  summarise(
    A = portion[decision_result == "A"][1],
    B = portion[decision_result == "B"][1],
    `No preference` = portion[decision_result == "No Preference"][1],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(A, B, `No preference`), ~ round(ifelse(is.na(.x), 0, .x), 4))
  )

knitr::kable(
  q3_condition_portion_table,
  caption = "Q3 Decision Portion Table by Condition"
)
Q3 Decision Portion Table by Condition
condition_label A B No preference
Baseline 0.2269 0.5224 0.2507
Condition 2 0.2544 0.5263 0.2193
Condition 3 0.2477 0.4587 0.2936
Condition 4 0.2385 0.4954 0.2661
Condition 5 0.2650 0.4615 0.2735
Condition 6 0.3119 0.4037 0.2844
Condition 9 0.1161 0.5536 0.3304
Condition 18 0.2589 0.5446 0.1964
Condition 19 0.3486 0.3945 0.2569
Condition 20 0.2281 0.4561 0.3158 
q3_interaction_portion <- q123_q3_model_data %>%
  count(interaction_availability, decision_result, .drop = FALSE, name = "n") %>%
  group_by(interaction_availability) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(n),
    portion = ifelse(total > 0, n / total, 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(q3_interaction_portion, aes(x = interaction_availability, y = portion, fill = decision_result)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    labels = function(x) paste0(round(x * 100), "%")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Q3 Decision Portion by Interaction Availability",
    x = "Interaction Availability",
    y = "Decision Portion",
    fill = "Decision"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

q3_interaction_portion_table <- q3_interaction_portion %>%
  group_by(interaction_availability) %>%
  summarise(
    A = portion[decision_result == "A"][1],
    B = portion[decision_result == "B"][1],
    `No preference` = portion[decision_result == "No Preference"][1],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(A, B, `No preference`), ~ round(ifelse(is.na(.x), 0, .x), 4))
  )

knitr::kable(
  q3_interaction_portion_table,
  caption = "Q3 Decision Portion Table by Interaction Availability"
)
Q3 Decision Portion Table by Interaction Availability
interaction_availability A B No preference
Static 0.2164 0.5179 0.2657
Interactive 0.2716 0.4537 0.2746
Buggy 0.2776 0.4657 0.2567 
q3_vistype_portion <- q123_q3_model_data %>%
  count(vistype, decision_result, .drop = FALSE, name = "n") %>%
  group_by(vistype) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(n),
    portion = ifelse(total > 0, n / total, 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(q3_vistype_portion, aes(x = vistype, y = portion, fill = decision_result)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    labels = function(x) paste0(round(x * 100), "%")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Q3 Decision Portion by Visualization Type",
    x = "Visualization Type",
    y = "Decision Portion",
    fill = "Decision"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

q3_vistype_portion_table <- q3_vistype_portion %>%
  group_by(vistype) %>%
  summarise(
    A = portion[decision_result == "A"][1],
    B = portion[decision_result == "B"][1],
    `No preference` = portion[decision_result == "No Preference"][1],
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(A, B, `No preference`), ~ round(ifelse(is.na(.x), 0, .x), 4))
  )

knitr::kable(
  q3_vistype_portion_table,
  caption = "Q3 Decision Portion Table by Visualization Type"
)
Q3 Decision Portion Table by Visualization Type
vistype A B No preference
PI 0.2578 0.4919 0.2504
Ensemble 0.2485 0.5000 0.2515
PI + Ensemble 0.2179 0.4716 0.3104 
q3_interaction_frequency <- q123_q3_model_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(interaction_availability), !is.na(decision_result)) %>%
  count(interaction_availability, decision_result, .drop = FALSE, name = "n")

q3_interaction_frequency_xtab <- xtabs(
  n ~ interaction_availability + decision_result,
  data = q3_interaction_frequency
)

knitr::kable(
  as.data.frame.matrix(q3_interaction_frequency_xtab),
  caption = "Q3 Frequency Table (A/B/No Preference) by Interaction Availability"
)
Q3 Frequency Table (A/B/No Preference) by Interaction Availability
A B No Preference
Static 145 347 178
Interactive 91 152 92
Buggy 93 156 86 
q3_interaction_chisq <- NULL
if (
  nrow(q3_interaction_frequency_xtab) > 1 &&
  ncol(q3_interaction_frequency_xtab) > 1 &&
  all(rowSums(q3_interaction_frequency_xtab) > 0) &&
  all(colSums(q3_interaction_frequency_xtab) > 0)
) {
  q3_interaction_chisq <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(q3_interaction_frequency_xtab))
}

q3_interaction_chisq_summary <- if (!is.null(q3_interaction_chisq)) {
  data.frame(
    predictor = "Interaction availability",
    chi_square = unname(q3_interaction_chisq$statistic),
    df = unname(q3_interaction_chisq$parameter),
    p_value = unname(q3_interaction_chisq$p.value),
    note = ""
  )
} else {
  data.frame(
    predictor = "Interaction availability",
    chi_square = NA_real_,
    df = NA_real_,
    p_value = NA_real_,
    note = "Chi-square test skipped: not enough non-zero cells."
  )
}

q3_interaction_chisq_summary <- q3_interaction_chisq_summary %>%
  mutate(
    chi_square = round(chi_square, 4),
    p_value = signif(p_value, 4)
  )

knitr::kable(
  q3_interaction_chisq_summary,
  caption = "Q3 Chi-square Test by Interaction Availability"
)
Q3 Chi-square Test by Interaction Availability
predictor chi_square df p_value note
Interaction availability 7.2207 4 0.1247 
q3_vistype_frequency <- q123_q3_model_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(vistype), !is.na(decision_result)) %>%
  count(vistype, decision_result, .drop = FALSE, name = "n")

q3_vistype_frequency_xtab <- xtabs(
  n ~ vistype + decision_result,
  data = q3_vistype_frequency
)

knitr::kable(
  as.data.frame.matrix(q3_vistype_frequency_xtab),
  caption = "Q3 Frequency Table (A/B/No Preference) by Visualization Type"
)
Q3 Frequency Table (A/B/No Preference) by Visualization Type
A B No Preference
PI 174 332 169
Ensemble 82 165 83
PI + Ensemble 73 158 104 
q3_vistype_chisq <- NULL
if (
  nrow(q3_vistype_frequency_xtab) > 1 &&
  ncol(q3_vistype_frequency_xtab) > 1 &&
  all(rowSums(q3_vistype_frequency_xtab) > 0) &&
  all(colSums(q3_vistype_frequency_xtab) > 0)
) {
  q3_vistype_chisq <- suppressWarnings(chisq.test(q3_vistype_frequency_xtab))
}

q3_vistype_chisq_summary <- if (!is.null(q3_vistype_chisq)) {
  data.frame(
    predictor = "Visualization type",
    chi_square = unname(q3_vistype_chisq$statistic),
    df = unname(q3_vistype_chisq$parameter),
    p_value = unname(q3_vistype_chisq$p.value),
    note = ""
  )
} else {
  data.frame(
    predictor = "Visualization type",
    chi_square = NA_real_,
    df = NA_real_,
    p_value = NA_real_,
    note = "Chi-square test skipped: not enough non-zero cells."
  )
}

q3_vistype_chisq_summary <- q3_vistype_chisq_summary %>%
  mutate(
    chi_square = round(chi_square, 4),
    p_value = signif(p_value, 4)
  )

knitr::kable(
  q3_vistype_chisq_summary,
  caption = "Q3 Chi-square Test by Visualization Type"
)
Q3 Chi-square Test by Visualization Type
predictor chi_square df p_value note
Visualization type 5.1362 4 0.2736
